contest_formula_context.usage: Formula terms are used only to rank non-promotable planning utility.

non_promotable_warning: Build a closed archive and run archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py via experiments/contest_auth_eval.py --device cuda on identical bytes before any score, rank, promotion, retirement, or paper claim.

byte_notes: PR65 anatomy exposes a 24-bit length-table bundle, not a pair trace.
manifolds.label: PR65
manifold_notes: compact reconstruction side information in archive.zip
excellent pose but worse SegNet than C-059
risk_notes: Global pose advantage is external rounded-field evidence only.
SegNet is worse than C-059 in public rounded fields.
No pair-local PR65 component trace is available to assign atoms.

byte_notes: Observed compressed pose segment is 899 bytes.
manifolds.label: PR67
manifold_notes: QZS3 grouped quantization with variable bit-depth per layer
delta plus VLQ QP1 pose encoding
87836 finite JFG parameters after QZS3 decode
risk_notes: PR67 pair transfer still requires a closed C-059 stack archive.

byte_notes: Local C-059 archive bytes are exact auth-eval custody context.
manifolds.label: C-059
manifold_notes: Internal C-059 target; use as destination manifold for transfer planning.

required_promotion_eval: Build a closed archive and run archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py via experiments/contest_auth_eval.py --device cuda on identical bytes before any score, rank, promotion, retirement, or paper claim.
